title: CVE-2025-29999: Path traversal in static file serving
summary: A path traversal vulnerability in Express's static file middleware allows an attacker to read arbitrary files from the server filesystem by crafting a request with encoded path separators. All applications using express.static() with user-controlled paths are affected. Patch to 4.21.3 immediately.
migration_hint: Upgrade to express 4.21.3 or later. No code changes required - the patch is drop-in.
